do_not_edit: Generated by cargo xtask generate. Freshness checked by cargo xtask check.

layer0-smoke.description: Minimal smoke fixtures for core m4 behavior
layer0-smoke.admission_meaning: Pass proves only the specific small fixture passed
layer0-smoke.seal_requirement: All non-skipped cases must be admitted_match

layer1-gnu-testsuite.admission_meaning: Pass proves selected GNU testsuite behavior matches
layer1-gnu-testsuite.seal_requirement: All non-skipped cases must be admitted_match
nonclaims: GNU m4 may have version-specific behaviors

layer2-manual-examples.description: GNU m4 manual examples and behavior examples
layer2-manual-examples.admission_meaning: Pass proves selected manual behavior examples passed
layer2-manual-examples.seal_requirement: All non-skipped cases must be admitted_match
nonclaims: Some examples may use GNU extensions

layer3-posix.admission_meaning: Pass does not imply full POSIX conformance unless POSIX mode and POSIX oracle rules are declared
layer3-posix.seal_requirement: All non-skipped cases must be admitted_match

layer4-autoconf-m4sugar.admission_meaning: Pass does not imply Autoconf replacement; only admitted corpus survival
layer4-autoconf-m4sugar.seal_requirement: All non-skipped cases must be admitted_match

layer5-autoconf-testsuite.description: Larger Autoconf testsuite or configure-generation pressure fixtures
layer5-autoconf-testsuite.admission_meaning: Pass does not imply Autoconf replacement; only admitted corpus survival
layer5-autoconf-testsuite.seal_requirement: All non-skipped cases must be admitted_match
